summary: Reduce a difference field and a threshold to the tight bounding box of the changed region (pixels whose magnitude exceeds the threshold) and the changed-pixel count. An all-quiet diff reports empty bounds.

inputs.name: diff
inputs.doc: The per-pixel difference magnitude field (e.g. analyze.diff's `diff`).

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The bounds report: the changed-pixel count and the tight changed bounds (empty when nothing changed).

params.name: threshold
params.doc: The magnitude a pixel must strictly exceed to count as changed.
